$comment: CANONICAL weft seam-index — hub-owned catalog + blessing registry for every cross-member seam in the federation. Source-of-truth doc: contracts-index.md (human twin) + pm/product/decisions/0045-hub-reclaims-seam-index-canon.md (declares this canon). CONTRACT: (1) The hub (~/weft) AUTHORS this file; it is federation canon. (2) wardline's tests/conformance/seam_registry.json is a producer-contributed CONFORMANCE MIRROR, NOT federation canon (PDR-0045). (3) This is a CATALOG + BLESSING registry, NOT a live verdict store: it records which seams EXIST, their contract URI, producer/consumer, and hub BLESSING provenance — it does NOT record per-run conformance VERDICTS (at_bar/gap/peer_conformant). Verdicts stay DISTRIBUTED in each member's own CI (the hub cannot mechanically verify a legis<->loomweave seam it is not party to; PDR-0043 GS-7 is distributed). (4) Like weft-reason-vocab.json: members stay independent repos (no shared runtime dep) and conform by a per-member conformance TEST; a hub bless lives here, never in a member's self-appointed steward decision. (5) NO SCHEMA RESTATEMENT — each row POINTS to the owning member's authoritative doc (that is how the old hub drifted). Adding/blessing a seam is a hub act under 'hub blesses every seam — no bilateral negotiation' (doctrine).

conformance_mirror.role: producer-contributed conformance mirror (runs the CI conformance gate + surfaces findings); NOT federation canon; carries per-seam verdicts + evidence which stay wardline-side. It CITES this index as canon (pull-down direction); the hub never reads the mirror to stay in sync. Any drift-check is a wardline-side source-drift job (the PDR-0043/0044 distributed pattern), never a hub-side lint against the mirror's export.
conformance_mirror.status_note: As of 2026-07-01 the mirror is on wardline main and still carries residual self-appointed 'weft seam steward' prose at seam_registry.json rows ~509/512/528; the wardline PR that rewords it to cite this index + PDR-0045 is tracked (dated, under the merge grant) and is the remaining limb of weft-dbaada5883 condition 2.

status_values.blessed: hub-blessed cross-member contract (owner gate or PM hub-governance PDR)
status_values.blessed-distributed: hub-blessed; conformance is verified per-consumer in each member's CI (no central gate)
status_values.launch-frozen: part of the clean-break launch freeze set (contracts-index.md); frozen at v1, versioned changes only
status_values.gap-tracked: seam exists / is named but not yet two-sided or a residual is tracked; verdict lives in the parties' CI
status_values.proposed: catalog placeholder pending a hub bless or the full mirror-reconciliation snapshot

seeding_note: Seeded 2026-07-01 from the hub-blessed contract set (contracts-index.md §0-§10) + the two blesses that were previously homeless in PDR prose (scan_manifest / PDR-0044, warpline glossary-freeze / PDR-0043) + the legis<->warpline preflight ruling row. The FULL reconciliation of the ~33-row wardline mirror into catalog rows is a tracked follow-on — deliberately NOT bulk-imported, to avoid laundering possibly-stale wardline verdicts as fresh hub canon (only CATALOG facts + hub blessings enter here; verdicts never do).

seams.note: First native row of this index — one of the two blesses that had no hub home before PDR-0045 (the payoff).

seams.contract_uri: warpline glossary-freeze v1 (warpline.error.v1, warpline.golden_vectors.v1, warpline.mcp_tool_inventory.v1, the 6 warpline.<contract>.v1 + enrichment reason vocab)
seams.note: Second native row — the other previously-homeless bless. GS-7 conformance is distributed per-consumer CI; residual oracle gaps tracked (weft-87443311a0 filigree, weft-7931a32599 loomweave).

seams.contract_uri: warpline.preflight_impact.v1 (advisory; surfaced via warpline_impact_radius_get MCP envelope: data.affected[], data.completeness, data.staleness, meta.local_only)
consumers: legis (advisory preflight context; NEVER gates governance — interface-lock §4A / GV-LG-1)
blessing: PDR-0037 (reverify_worklist consumption ruled OUT — legis relies on impact_radius alone)
PDR-0045 (legis conforms DOWN to warpline's frozen MCP envelope — consume data.affected, verify meta.local_only per GV-LG-3)
seams.note: The two cross-sibling RULINGS here (reverify-out, conforms-down) are HUB calls (PDR-0037/0045), no longer wardline steward decisions. The former 'false freeze' VERDICT is RESOLVED (verified 2026-07-01): legis 1.4.0 ships WarplineMcpClient, HttpWarplineClient gone from src. Residual legis consumer-oracle re-freeze is a distributed legis-CI task (weft-51699a641c); reverify code-drop is weft-5cbe6bc11b.

blessing: PDR-0037 (legis explicitly excluded as a consumer)

seams.contract_uri: Loomweave ADR-036 (POST /api/wardline/taint-facts; wardline_json blob stored opaque)

seams.authoritative: contracts-index.md §4 + wardline src/wardline/core/filigree_emit.py; suppression-filter vector wardline tests/conformance/filigree_suppression_filter_contract.json
contracts-index.md §5 + Loomweave ADR-018 (ADR-049 Rust dialect versions out-of-band, lockstep)

seams.contract_uri: SEI-keyed sign-off binding (POST /signoff/request, .../bind-issue, .../sign on the entity-association surface)
wardline_scan_artifact.v1 signed artifact (required findings key) + dirty-tree dev-artifact contract
consumers: legis (2x2 enforcement cells; never re-adjudicates trust)

seams.authoritative: contracts-index.md §9 + Charter ADR-006 (designed, adapter pending — no emitter shipped)

seams.contract_uri: opaque SEI on trace links (charter never mints/parses)
